2605.06702.title: CASCADE: Case-Based Continual Adaptation for Large Language Models During Deployment
2605.06702.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have become a central foundation of modern artificial intelligence, yet their lifecycle remains constrained by a rigid separation between training and deployment, after which learning effectively ceases. This limitation contrasts with natural intelligence, which continually adapts through interaction with its environment. In this paper, we formalise deployment-time learning (DTL) as the third stage in the LLM lifecycle that enables LLM agents to improve from experience during deployment without modifying model parameters. We present CASCADE (CASe-based Continual Adaptation during DEployment), a general and principled framework that equips LLM agents with an explicit, evolving episodic memory. CASCADE formulates experience reuse as a contextual bandit problem, enabling principled exploration-exploitation trade-offs and establishing no-regret guarantees over long-term interactions. This design allows agents to accumulate, select, and refine task-relevant cases, transforming past experience into actionable knowledge. Across 16 diverse tasks spanning medical diagnosis, legal analysis, code generation, web search, tool use, and embodied interaction, CASCADE improves macro-averaged success rate by 20.9% over zero-shot prompting while consistently outperforming gradient-based and memory-based baselines. By reframing deployment as an adaptive learning process, this work establishes a foundation for continually improving AI systems.
2605.06702.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）已成為現代人工智慧的核心基礎，但它們的生命周期仍然受到訓練與部署之間嚴格分隔的限制，之後學習實際上停止。這一限制與自然智能形成對比，後者通過與環境的互動不斷適應。在本文中，我們將部署時學習（DTL）正式化為LLM生命周期中的第三個階段，使LLM代理能夠在部署期間從經驗中改進，而無需修改模型參數。我們提出了CASCADE（基於案例的持續適應於部署期間），這是一個通用且原則性的框架，為LLM代理提供明確的、演變的情景記憶。CASCADE將經驗重用公式化為一個上下文賭徒問題，實現了原則性的探索-利用權衡，並在長期互動中建立了無悔的保證。這一設計使代理能夠積累、選擇和精煉與任務相關的案例，將過去的經驗轉化為可行的知識。在涵蓋醫療診斷、法律分析、代碼生成、網絡搜索、工具使用和具身互動等16個多樣化任務中，CASCADE在零樣本提示上提高了20.9%的宏觀平均成功率，同時始終超越基於梯度和基於記憶的基準。通過將部署重新框架為一個自適應學習過程，這項工作為持續改進AI系統奠定了基礎。
2605.06702.author: Siyuan Guo et.al.
2605.06702.authors: Siyuan Guo, Yali Du, Hechang Chen, Yi Chang, Jun Wang
